chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 3504 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For order as to non-prosecution. 06.08.2024. Mr. Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for Petitioner. -------------- Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
